KHAS Department of International Relations: “Looking at Turkish Foreign Policy in the 100th Anniversary of the Republic”

As part of the activities organized for the 100th anniversary of our Republic, Kadir Has University Department of International Relations organized a panel titled “Looking at Turkish Foreign Policy in the 100th Anniversary of the Republic” on Monday, October 30 at 16.15.

In the panel, Mitat Çelikpala, Sinem Akgül-Açıkmeşe, Serhat Güvenç and Soli Özel discussed the past, present and future of Turkish foreign policy.
